purpose: Resource ID header included by MarkdownPlusPlus.rc. Currently exposes a single plugin-name string resource ID; hand-edited rather than regenerated by Visual Studio's resource editor.
invariants: Resource IDs must not collide; new IDs should follow the standard Visual Studio convention (IDS_ for strings, IDI_ for icons, IDD_ for dialogs).
gotchas: If Visual Studio's resource editor is ever opened on the project, it may rewrite this file and add APSTUDIO guards plus _APS_NEXT_* counters.
